HomeDestinationsRamdhura
West Bengal

Ramdhura

Where the Clouds Embrace the Mountains

Misty ridge where clouds kiss the earth, a mystical stillness broken only by distant bird calls.

4.5
(92 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Ramdhura is a peaceful village perched on a ridge, offering uninterrupted views of the Teesta River and the Eastern Himalayas. A hidden gem for nature lovers.

History

Once a forested area, Ramdhura has transformed into a sustainable tourism village with community-led homestays.

Altitude

1,300 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Nature

Icche Gaon

A scenic village known for its sunrise views.

Viewpoint

Teesta River Viewpoint

Stunning views of the Teesta River winding through the valley.

KuboVista

Sillery Gaon Walk

A serene forest trail connecting Ramdhura to Sillery Gaon.

Why visit: Birdwatching and peace

Viewpoints

panoramic

Ramdhura View Tower

Panoramic views of Mt. Kanchenjunga.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Hillside Kitchen

4.4

Local & Nepali • ₹250-450

Home-cooked meals with valley views.

Cafes

Cloud Cafe

4.3

Specialty: Organic Tea

Sit among the clouds with a warm cup.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Village Craft Center

Local handicrafts and organic produce.

Organic honeyHandmade soapsWoolen crafts

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Forest Trek

Easy

Trek through pine and oak forests.

3 hrs
₹800

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

Nearby Airport

Bike Rental
